name: Asus XG27ACS (IPS Panel, Res: 2560X1440, 180Hz, 1ms GTG ) 2K
highlights: ROG Strix XG27ACS is a high-performance 27-inch QHD gaming monitor featuring a Fast IPS panel with 180Hz refresh rate, 1ms GTG response time, and HDR10 support
Delivering 97% DCI-P3 and 133% sRGB color coverage, it ensures ultra-vivid visuals for competitive gaming and creative workflows
With Adaptive-Sync, ELMB Sync, and versatile connectivity including USB-C, DisplayPort, and HDMI, the XG27ACS offers an immersive, tear-free experience with ergonomic design for peak comfort
description: Asus XG27ACS (IPS Panel, Res: 2560X1440, 180Hz, 1ms GTG ) 2K Price in Pakistan Category Details Model ROG Strix XG27ACS Display Size 27 inches Aspect Ratio 16:9 Resolution 2560 x 1440 (QHD) Panel Type Fast IPS Color Space 97% DCI-P3, 133% sRGB Brightness 350 cd/㎡ (typical), 400 cd/㎡ (HDR peak) Contrast Ratio 1000:1 Viewing Angles 178° / 178° Response Time 1ms (GTG) Refresh Rate Up to 180Hz HDR Support HDR10 Display Surface Anti-glare Display Colors 16.7 million Pixel Pitch 0.233mm Gaming Feature
